preconditions: User is unauthenticated and has not signed in
Application loads the shared Home page in guest state

testCases.title: Verify Home page loads successfully in guest state for an unauthenticated user
steps: Open a browser session
Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home
Wait for the Home page guest-state view to finish loading
testCases.expectedResult: The shared Home page loads successfully in guest state while the user remains unauthenticated, and guest-accessible controls are displayed without any authenticated user indicators.

testCases.title: Verify guest-state Home controls are visible and enabled on initial page load
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home while unauthenticated
Observe the Home page controls after the page finishes loading
Verify the Person/Profile button, Back button, Notification button, Home button, Customer signup button, Clean survey button, and Site survey button are displayed
Attempt to focus and click each displayed control once
testCases.expectedResult: All approved guest-state controls and shared Home shell controls are visible, enabled, focusable, and actionable from the Home page guest state.

testCases.title: Verify navigation from Person/Profile button opens the Login page or Login view
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home while unauthenticated
Click the Person/Profile button from the Home page guest state
Observe the destination view after navigation completes
testCases.expectedResult: Selecting the Person/Profile button transitions the application from the Home guest state to the Login page or Login view while preserving unauthenticated status.

testCases.title: Verify navigation from Customer signup button opens the customer-search page
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home while unauthenticated
Click the Customer signup button
Observe the destination page after navigation completes
testCases.expectedResult: Selecting the Customer signup button transitions the application from the Home guest state to the customer-search page without authenticating the user.

testCases.title: Verify navigation from Clean survey button opens the vehicle-survey page
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home while unauthenticated
Click the Clean survey button
Observe the destination page after navigation completes
testCases.expectedResult: Selecting the Clean survey button transitions the application from the Home guest state to the vehicle-survey page without changing the unauthenticated session state.

testCases.title: Verify navigation from Site survey button opens the survey page
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home while unauthenticated
Click the Site survey button
Observe the destination page after navigation completes
testCases.expectedResult: Selecting the Site survey button transitions the application from the Home guest state to the survey page while the user remains unauthenticated.

testCases.title: Verify returning to the Home page preserves guest-state behavior after opening the Login view
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home while unauthenticated
Click the Person/Profile button to open the Login page or Login view
Use browser back navigation or the application Home navigation to return to the Home page
Observe the Home page after returning
testCases.expectedResult: The application returns to the shared Home page in guest state, approved guest controls remain visible and enabled, and the user is still unauthenticated.

testCases.title: Verify Home button remains visible and enabled in guest state
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home while unauthenticated
Locate the Home button in the shared Home shell
Select the Home button while already on the Home page
testCases.expectedResult: The Home button is visible and enabled in guest state and selecting it keeps the application on the Home page guest state without authentication changes.

testCases.title: Verify Notification button remains visible and enabled in guest state
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home while unauthenticated
Locate the Notification button in the shared Home shell
Click the Notification button once
testCases.expectedResult: The Notification button is visible and enabled in guest state, and clicking it does not expose authenticated-only capabilities or change the unauthenticated session state.

testCases.title: Verify Back button remains visible and enabled in guest state
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home while unauthenticated
Locate the Back button in the shared Home shell
Click the Back button from the Home page guest state
testCases.expectedResult: The Back button is visible and enabled in guest state and does not expose authenticated-only content or cause unauthorized navigation.
